meaning: n.(珠宝匠、钟表匠等套在眼窝上的)小型放大镜
examples: Which model loupe do I need?
Additionally it has a screen loupe and a RGB value window.
You would need a jeweller's loupe the size of the Sun to grade this diamond.
By rotating two fingers in a turning motion on this loupe, you can zoom in closer.
There is no function to these decorative notches, which you need a jeweler's loupe to see clearly.
